000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;40         uint32_t u32Div;
;;;41         uint32_t u32Pclk;
;;;42     
;;;43         if( (i2c == I2C1) || (i2c == I2C3) )

;;;45             u32Pclk = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq();

;;;46         }
;;;47         else
;;;48         {
;;;49             u32Pclk = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq();

;;;50         }
;;;51     
;;;52         u32Div = (uint32_t)(((u32Pclk * 10U) / (u32BusClock * 4U) + 5U) / 10U - 1U); /* Compute proper divider for I2C clock */

;;;54     
;;;55         /* Enable I2C */
;;;56         i2c->CTL0 |= I2C_CTL0_I2CEN_Msk;

;;;58         return (u32Pclk / ((u32Div + 1U) << 2U));

;;;59     }
000044  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;60

;;;144            u32Reg |= I2C_CTL_STO;

;;;147        if(u8Si)

;;;148        {
;;;149            u32Reg |= I2C_CTL_SI;

;;;150        }
;;;151    
;;;152        if(u8Ack)

;;;153        {
;;;154            u32Reg |= I2C_CTL_AA;
0000ec  f0440404          ORR      r4,r4,#4
                  |L1.240|
;;;155        }
;;;156    
;;;157        i2c->CTL0 = (i2c->CTL0 & ~0x3CU) | u32Reg;

;;;159

                  I2C_DisableTimeout PROC
;;;417     */
;;;418    void I2C_DisableTimeout(I2C_T *i2c)
0001f2  6941              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
;;;419    {
;;;420        i2c->TOCTL &= ~I2C_TOCTL_TOCEN_Msk;
0001f4  f0210104          BIC      r1,r1,#4
0001f8  6141              STR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
;;;421    }
0001fa  4770              BX       lr
;;;422    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_EnableWakeup PROC
;;;432     */
;;;433    void I2C_EnableWakeup(I2C_T *i2c)
0001fc  6bc1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]
;;;434    {
;;;435        i2c->WKCTL |= I2C_WKCTL_WKEN_Msk;
0001fe  f0410101          ORR      r1,r1,#1
000202  63c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]
;;;436    }
000204  4770              BX       lr
;;;437    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_DisableWakeup PROC
;;;447     */
;;;448    void I2C_DisableWakeup(I2C_T *i2c)

;;;449    {
;;;450        i2c->WKCTL &= ~I2C_WKCTL_WKEN_Msk;
000208  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
00020c  63c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]
;;;451    }
00020e  4770              BX       lr
;;;452    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusGetStatus PROC

                  I2C_SMBusOpen PROC
;;;510     */
;;;511    void I2C_SMBusOpen(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8HostDevice)
00021c  6d02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x50]
;;;512    {
;;;513        /* Clear  BMHEN, BMDEN of BUSCTL Register */
;;;514        i2c->BUSCTL &=  ~(I2C_BUSCTL_BMHEN_Msk | I2C_BUSCTL_BMDEN_Msk);
00021e  f022020c          BIC      r2,r2,#0xc
000222  6502              STR      r2,[r0,#0x50]
;;;515    
;;;516        /* Set SMBus Host/Device Mode, and enable Bus Management*/
;;;517        if(u8HostDevice == (uint8_t)I2C_SMBH_ENABLE)
000224  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000226  d004              BEQ      |L1.562|
;;;518        {
;;;519            i2c->BUSCTL |= (I2C_BUSCTL_BMHEN_Msk | I2C_BUSCTL_BUSEN_Msk);
;;;520        }
;;;521        else
;;;522        {
;;;523            i2c->BUSCTL |= (I2C_BUSCTL_BMDEN_Msk | I2C_BUSCTL_BUSEN_Msk);
000228  6d01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x50]
00022a  f0410184          ORR      r1,r1,#0x84
00022e  6501              STR      r1,[r0,#0x50]
;;;524        }
;;;525    }
000230  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.562|
000232  6d01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x50]         ;519
000234  f0410188          ORR      r1,r1,#0x88           ;519
000238  6501              STR      r1,[r0,#0x50]         ;519
00023a  4770              BX       lr
;;;526    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusClose PROC
;;;536     */
;;;537    void I2C_SMBusClose(I2C_T *i2c)
00023c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;538    {
;;;539    
;;;540        i2c->BUSCTL = 0x00U;
00023e  6501              STR      r1,[r0,#0x50]
;;;541    }
000240  4770              BX       lr
;;;542    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusPECTxEnable PROC
;;;553     */
;;;554    void I2C_SMBusPECTxEnable(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8PECTxEn)
000242  6d02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x50]
;;;555    {
;;;556        i2c->BUSCTL &= ~I2C_BUSCTL_PECTXEN_Msk;
000244  f4227280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x100
000248  6502              STR      r2,[r0,#0x50]
;;;557    
;;;558        if(u8PECTxEn)
00024a  2900              CMP      r1,#0
00024c  d004              BEQ      |L1.600|
;;;559        {
;;;560            i2c->BUSCTL |= (I2C_BUSCTL_PECEN_Msk | I2C_BUSCTL_PECTXEN_Msk);
00024e  6d01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x50]
000250  f4417181          ORR      r1,r1,#0x102
000254  6501              STR      r1,[r0,#0x50]
;;;561        }
;;;562        else
;;;563        {
;;;564            i2c->BUSCTL |= I2C_BUSCTL_PECEN_Msk;
;;;565        }
;;;566    }
000256  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.600|
000258  6d01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x50]         ;564
00025a  f0410102          ORR      r1,r1,#2              ;564
00025e  6501              STR      r1,[r0,#0x50]         ;564
000260  4770              BX       lr
;;;567    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusGetPECValue PROC
;;;577     */
;;;578    uint8_t I2C_SMBusGetPECValue(I2C_T *i2c)
000262  6e00              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x60]
;;;579    {
;;;580        return (uint8_t)i2c->PKTCRC;
000264  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;581    }
000266  4770              BX       lr
;;;582    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusIdleTimeout PROC
;;;595    
;;;596    void I2C_SMBusIdleTimeout(I2C_T *i2c, uint32_t us, uint32_t u32Hclk)
000268  6d03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;597    {
;;;598        uint32_t  u32Div, u32Hclk_kHz;
;;;599    
;;;600        i2c->BUSCTL |= I2C_BUSCTL_TIDLE_Msk;
00026a  f4437300          ORR      r3,r3,#0x200
00026e  6503              STR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;601        u32Hclk_kHz = u32Hclk / 1000U;
000270  f44f737a          MOV      r3,#0x3e8
000274  fbb2f2f3          UDIV     r2,r2,r3
;;;602        u32Div = (((us * u32Hclk_kHz) / 1000U) >> 2U) - 1U;
000278  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
00027a  fbb1f1f3          UDIV     r1,r1,r3
00027e  f04f32ff          MOV      r2,#0xffffffff
000282  eb020191          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSR #2
;;;603        if(u32Div > 255U)
000286  29ff              CMP      r1,#0xff
000288  d902              BLS      |L1.656|
;;;604        {
;;;605            i2c->BUSTOUT = 0xFFU;
00028a  21ff              MOVS     r1,#0xff
00028c  6641              STR      r1,[r0,#0x64]
;;;606        }
;;;607        else
;;;608        {
;;;609            i2c->BUSTOUT = u32Div;
;;;610        }
;;;611    
;;;612    }
00028e  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.656|
000290  6641              STR      r1,[r0,#0x64]         ;609
000292  4770              BX       lr
;;;613    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusTimeout PROC
;;;627    
;;;628    void I2C_SMBusTimeout(I2C_T *i2c, uint32_t ms, uint32_t u32Pclk)
000294  6d03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;629    {
;;;630        uint32_t u32Div, u32Pclk_kHz;
;;;631    
;;;632        i2c->BUSCTL &= ~I2C_BUSCTL_TIDLE_Msk;
000296  f4237300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x200
00029a  6503              STR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;633    
;;;634        /* DIV4 disabled */
;;;635        i2c->TOCTL &= ~I2C_TOCTL_TOCEN_Msk;
00029c  6943              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
00029e  f0230304          BIC      r3,r3,#4
0002a2  6143              STR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
;;;636        u32Pclk_kHz = u32Pclk / 1000U;
0002a4  f44f737a          MOV      r3,#0x3e8
0002a8  fbb2f2f3          UDIV     r2,r2,r3
;;;637        u32Div = ((ms * u32Pclk_kHz) / (16U * 1024U)) - 1U;
0002ac  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
0002ae  f04f33ff          MOV      r3,#0xffffffff
0002b2  eb033291          ADD      r2,r3,r1,LSR #14
;;;638        if(u32Div <= 0xFFU)
0002b6  2aff              CMP      r2,#0xff
0002b8  d801              BHI      |L1.702|
;;;639        {
;;;640            i2c->BUSTOUT = u32Div;
0002ba  6642              STR      r2,[r0,#0x64]
;;;641        }
;;;642        else
;;;643        {
;;;644            /* DIV4 enabled */
;;;645            i2c->TOCTL |= I2C_TOCTL_TOCEN_Msk;
;;;646            i2c->BUSTOUT = (((ms * u32Pclk_kHz) / (16U * 1024U * 4U)) - 1U) & 0xFFU; /* The max value is 255 */
;;;647        }
;;;648    }
0002bc  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.702|
0002be  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]         ;645
0002c0  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4              ;645
0002c4  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]         ;645
0002c6  eb034111          ADD      r1,r3,r1,LSR #16      ;646
0002ca  b2c9              UXTB     r1,r1                 ;646
0002cc  6641              STR      r1,[r0,#0x64]         ;646
0002ce  4770              BX       lr
;;;649    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_SMBusClockLoTimeout PROC
;;;663    
;;;664    void I2C_SMBusClockLoTimeout(I2C_T *i2c, uint32_t ms, uint32_t u32Pclk)
0002d0  6d03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;665    {
;;;666        uint32_t u32Div, u32Pclk_kHz;
;;;667    
;;;668        i2c->BUSCTL &= ~I2C_BUSCTL_TIDLE_Msk;
0002d2  f4237300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x200
0002d6  6503              STR      r3,[r0,#0x50]
;;;669    
;;;670        /* DIV4 disabled */
;;;671        i2c->TOCTL &= ~I2C_TOCTL_TOCEN_Msk;
0002d8  6943              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
0002da  f0230304          BIC      r3,r3,#4
0002de  6143              STR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
;;;672        u32Pclk_kHz = u32Pclk / 1000U;
0002e0  f44f737a          MOV      r3,#0x3e8
0002e4  fbb2f2f3          UDIV     r2,r2,r3
;;;673        u32Div = ((ms * u32Pclk_kHz) / (16U * 1024U)) - 1U;
0002e8  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
0002ea  f04f33ff          MOV      r3,#0xffffffff
0002ee  eb033291          ADD      r2,r3,r1,LSR #14
;;;674        if(u32Div <= 0xFFU)
0002f2  2aff              CMP      r2,#0xff
0002f4  d801              BHI      |L1.762|
;;;675        {
;;;676            i2c->CLKTOUT = u32Div;
0002f6  6682              STR      r2,[r0,#0x68]
;;;677        }
;;;678        else
;;;679        {
;;;680            /* DIV4 enabled */
;;;681            i2c->TOCTL |= I2C_TOCTL_TOCEN_Msk;
;;;682            i2c->CLKTOUT = (((ms * u32Pclk_kHz) / (16U * 1024U * 4U)) - 1U) & 0xFFU; /* The max value is 255 */
;;;683        }
;;;684    }
0002f8  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.762|
0002fa  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]         ;681
0002fc  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4              ;681
000300  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]         ;681
000302  eb034111          ADD      r1,r3,r1,LSR #16      ;682
000306  b2c9              UXTB     r1,r1                 ;682
000308  6681              STR      r1,[r0,#0x68]         ;682
00030a  4770              BX       lr
;;;685    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteByte PROC
;;;702    
;;;703    uint8_t I2C_WriteByte(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t data)
00030c  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;704    {
;;;705        uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
00030e  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
000310  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000312  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;706        uint32_t u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
;;;707    
;;;708        g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
000314  f8dfc0ec          LDR      r12,|L1.1028|
000318  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
00031a  f8cc3000          STR      r3,[r12,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;709    
;;;710        I2C_START(i2c);
00031e  6803              LDR      r3,[r0,#0]
000320  f0230308          BIC      r3,r3,#8
000324  f0430320          ORR      r3,r3,#0x20
000328  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]
00032a  e027              B        |L1.892|
                  |L1.812|
;;;711        while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;712        {
;;;713            u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
00032c  4b36              LDR      r3,|L1.1032|
00032e  681b              LDR      r3,[r3,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;714            I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000330  e001              B        |L1.822|
                  |L1.818|
;;;715            {
;;;716                if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
000332  1e5b              SUBS     r3,r3,#1
000334  d00b              BEQ      |L1.846|
                  |L1.822|
000336  6807              LDR      r7,[r0,#0]            ;714
000338  073f              LSLS     r7,r7,#28             ;714
00033a  d5fa              BPL      |L1.818|
                  |L1.828|
;;;717                {
;;;718                    g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;719                    u8Err = 1u;
;;;720                    break;
;;;721                }
;;;722            }
;;;723    
;;;724            switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
00033c  68c3              LDR      r3,[r0,#0xc]
00033e  2b20              CMP      r3,#0x20
000340  d029              BEQ      |L1.918|
000342  dc0a              BGT      |L1.858|
000344  2b08              CMP      r3,#8
000346  d01f              BEQ      |L1.904|
000348  2b18              CMP      r3,#0x18
00034a  d10a              BNE      |L1.866|
00034c  e021              B        |L1.914|
                  |L1.846|
00034e  f06f0301          MVN      r3,#1                 ;718
000352  f8cc3000          STR      r3,[r12,#0]           ;718  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000356  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;719
000358  e7f0              B        |L1.828|
                  |L1.858|
00035a  2b28              CMP      r3,#0x28
00035c  d01e              BEQ      |L1.924|
00035e  2b30              CMP      r3,#0x30
000360  d019              BEQ      |L1.918|
                  |L1.866|
;;;725            {
;;;726            case 0x08u:
;;;727                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));    /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
;;;728                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                              /* Clear SI */
;;;729                break;
;;;730            case 0x18u:                                           /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;731                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data);                          /* Write data to I2CDAT */
;;;732                break;
;;;733            case 0x20u:                                           /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;734            case 0x30u:                                           /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;735                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                          /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;736                u8Err = 1u;
;;;737                break;
;;;738            case 0x28u:
;;;739                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                          /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;740                u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;741                break;
;;;742            case 0x38u:                                           /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;743            default:                                              /* Unknow status */
;;;744                I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);      /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000362  6803              LDR      r3,[r0,#0]
000364  f023033c          BIC      r3,r3,#0x3c
000368  f0430318          ORR      r3,r3,#0x18
00036c  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]
;;;745                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
00036e  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;746                u8Err = 1u;
000370  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
                  |L1.882|
;;;747                break;
;;;748            }
;;;749            I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                        /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000372  6803              LDR      r3,[r0,#0]
000374  f023033c          BIC      r3,r3,#0x3c
000378  4323              ORRS     r3,r3,r4
00037a  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.892|
00037c  b10e              CBZ      r6,|L1.898|
00037e  2d00              CMP      r5,#0                 ;711
000380  d0d4              BEQ      |L1.812|
                  |L1.898|
;;;750        }
;;;751        return (u8Err | u8Xfering);                                  /* return (Success)/(Fail) status */
000382  ea450006          ORR      r0,r5,r6
;;;752    }
000386  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L1.904|
000388  064b              LSLS     r3,r1,#25             ;727
00038a  0e1b              LSRS     r3,r3,#24             ;727
00038c  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]            ;727
00038e  2408              MOVS     r4,#8                 ;728
000390  e7ef              B        |L1.882|
                  |L1.914|
000392  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;731
000394  e7ed              B        |L1.882|
                  |L1.918|
000396  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18              ;735
000398  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;736
00039a  e7ea              B        |L1.882|
                  |L1.924|
00039c  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18              ;739
00039e  2600              MOVS     r6,#0                 ;740
0003a0  e7e7              B        |L1.882|
;;;753    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteMultiBytes PROC
;;;769    
;;;770    uint32_t I2C_WriteMultiBytes(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t data[], uint32_t u32wLen)
0003a2  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;771    {
;;;772        uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
0003a6  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
0003aa  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
0003ac  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;773        uint32_t u32txLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
0003ae  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;774    
;;;775        g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
0003b0  f8df8050          LDR      r8,|L1.1028|
0003b4  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0003b6  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;776    
;;;777        I2C_START(i2c);                                              /* Send START */
0003ba  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0003bc  f0240408          BIC      r4,r4,#8
0003c0  f0440420          ORR      r4,r4,#0x20
0003c4  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
0003c6  e038              B        |L1.1082|
                  |L1.968|
;;;778        while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;779        {
;;;780            u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
0003c8  4c0f              LDR      r4,|L1.1032|
0003ca  6824              LDR      r4,[r4,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;781            I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
0003cc  e001              B        |L1.978|
                  |L1.974|
;;;782            {
;;;783                if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
0003ce  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
0003d0  d01c              BEQ      |L1.1036|
                  |L1.978|
0003d2  f8d09000          LDR      r9,[r0,#0]            ;781
0003d6  ea5f7909          LSLS     r9,r9,#28             ;781
0003da  d5f8              BPL      |L1.974|
                  |L1.988|
;;;784                {
;;;785                    g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;786                    u8Err = 1u;
;;;787                    break;
;;;788                }
;;;789            }
;;;790    
;;;791            switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
0003dc  68c4              LDR      r4,[r0,#0xc]
0003de  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
0003e0  d043              BEQ      |L1.1130|
0003e2  dc19              BGT      |L1.1048|
0003e4  2c08              CMP      r4,#8
0003e6  d030              BEQ      |L1.1098|
0003e8  2c18              CMP      r4,#0x18
0003ea  d119              BNE      |L1.1056|
0003ec  e032              B        |L1.1108|
0003ee  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.1008|
                          DCD      0x40081000
                  |L1.1012|
                          DCD      0x40083000
                  |L1.1016|
                          DCD      0x40080000
                  |L1.1020|
                          DCD      0x40082000
                  |L1.1024|
                          DCD      0x40084000
                  |L1.1028|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L1.1032|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L1.1036|
00040c  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;785
000410  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]            ;785  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000414  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;786
000416  e7e1              B        |L1.988|
                  |L1.1048|
000418  2c28              CMP      r4,#0x28
00041a  d01b              BEQ      |L1.1108|
00041c  2c30              CMP      r4,#0x30
00041e  d024              BEQ      |L1.1130|
                  |L1.1056|
;;;792            {
;;;793            case 0x08u:
;;;794                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));    /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
;;;795                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                           /* Clear SI */
;;;796                break;
;;;797            case 0x18u:                                           /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;798            case 0x28u:
;;;799                if(u32txLen < u32wLen)
;;;800                {
;;;801                    I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data[u32txLen++]);                /* Write Data to I2CDAT */
;;;802                }
;;;803                else
;;;804                {
;;;805                    u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                   /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;806                    u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;807                }
;;;808                break;
;;;809            case 0x20u:                                           /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;810            case 0x30u:                                           /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;811                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                       /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;812                u8Err = 1u;
;;;813                break;
;;;814            case 0x38u:                                           /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;815            default:                                             /* Unknow status */
;;;816                I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);      /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000420  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000422  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000426  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
00042a  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;817                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
00042c  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;818                u8Err = 1u;
00042e  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
                  |L1.1072|
;;;819                break;
;;;820            }
;;;821            I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                        /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000430  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000432  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000436  432c              ORRS     r4,r4,r5
000438  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1082|
00043a  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;778
00043e  d001              BEQ      |L1.1092|
000440  2f00              CMP      r7,#0                 ;778
000442  d0c1              BEQ      |L1.968|
                  |L1.1092|
;;;822        }
;;;823        return u32txLen;                                             /* Return bytes length that have been transmitted */
000444  4630              MOV      r0,r6
                  |L1.1094|
;;;824    }
000446  e8bd83f0          POP      {r4-r9,pc}
                  |L1.1098|
00044a  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25             ;794
00044c  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24             ;794
00044e  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;794
000450  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;795
000452  e7ed              B        |L1.1072|
                  |L1.1108|
000454  429e              CMP      r6,r3                 ;799
000456  d204              BCS      |L1.1122|
000458  4634              MOV      r4,r6                 ;801
00045a  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;801
00045c  5d14              LDRB     r4,[r2,r4]            ;801
00045e  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;801
000460  e7e6              B        |L1.1072|
                  |L1.1122|
000462  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;805
000464  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0                ;806
000468  e7e2              B        |L1.1072|
                  |L1.1130|
00046a  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;811
00046c  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;812
00046e  e7df              B        |L1.1072|
;;;825    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteByteOneReg PROC
;;;842    
;;;843    uint8_t I2C_WriteByteOneReg(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t u8DataAddr, uint8_t data)
000470  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;844    {
;;;845        uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000474  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
000476  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000478  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;846        uint32_t u32txLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
00047a  46ac              MOV      r12,r5
;;;847    
;;;848        g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
00047c  f8df8400          LDR      r8,|L1.2176|
000480  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000482  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;849    
;;;850        I2C_START(i2c);                                              /* Send START */
000486  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000488  f0240408          BIC      r4,r4,#8
00048c  f0440420          ORR      r4,r4,#0x20
000490  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
000492  e029              B        |L1.1256|
                  |L1.1172|
;;;851        while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;852        {
;;;853            u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
000494  4cfb              LDR      r4,|L1.2180|
000496  6824              LDR      r4,[r4,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;854            I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000498  e001              B        |L1.1182|
                  |L1.1178|
;;;855            {
;;;856                if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
00049a  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
00049c  d00d              BEQ      |L1.1210|
                  |L1.1182|
00049e  f8d09000          LDR      r9,[r0,#0]            ;854
0004a2  ea5f7909          LSLS     r9,r9,#28             ;854
0004a6  d5f8              BPL      |L1.1178|
                  |L1.1192|
;;;857                {
;;;858                    g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;859                    u8Err = 1u;
;;;860                    break;
;;;861                }
;;;862            }
;;;863    
;;;864            switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
0004a8  68c4              LDR      r4,[r0,#0xc]
0004aa  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
0004ac  d029              BEQ      |L1.1282|
0004ae  dc0a              BGT      |L1.1222|
0004b0  2c08              CMP      r4,#8
0004b2  d01f              BEQ      |L1.1268|
0004b4  2c18              CMP      r4,#0x18
0004b6  d10a              BNE      |L1.1230|
0004b8  e021              B        |L1.1278|
                  |L1.1210|
0004ba  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;858
0004be  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]            ;858  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
0004c2  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;859
0004c4  e7f0              B        |L1.1192|
                  |L1.1222|
0004c6  2c28              CMP      r4,#0x28
0004c8  d01e              BEQ      |L1.1288|
0004ca  2c30              CMP      r4,#0x30
0004cc  d019              BEQ      |L1.1282|
                  |L1.1230|
;;;865            {
;;;866            case 0x08u:
;;;867                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));    /* Send Slave address with write bit */
;;;868                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                           /* Clear SI */
;;;869                break;
;;;870            case 0x18u:                                           /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;871                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, u8DataAddr);                   /* Write Lo byte address of register */
;;;872                break;
;;;873            case 0x20u:                                           /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;874            case 0x30u:                                           /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;875                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                       /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;876                u8Err = 1u;
;;;877                break;
;;;878            case 0x28u:
;;;879                if(u32txLen < 1u)
;;;880                {
;;;881                    I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data);
;;;882                    u32txLen++;
;;;883                }
;;;884                else
;;;885                {
;;;886                    u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                   /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;887                    u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;888                }
;;;889                break;
;;;890            case 0x38u:                                           /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;891            default:                                             /* Unknow status */
;;;892                I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);      /* Clear SI and send STOP */
0004ce  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0004d0  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
0004d4  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
0004d8  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;893                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
0004da  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;894                u8Err = 1u;
0004dc  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
                  |L1.1246|
;;;895                break;
;;;896            }
;;;897            I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                        /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
0004de  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0004e0  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
0004e4  432c              ORRS     r4,r4,r5
0004e6  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1256|
0004e8  b10f              CBZ      r7,|L1.1262|
0004ea  2e00              CMP      r6,#0                 ;851
0004ec  d0d2              BEQ      |L1.1172|
                  |L1.1262|
;;;898        }
;;;899        return (u8Err | u8Xfering);                                  /* return (Success)/(Fail) status */
0004ee  ea460007          ORR      r0,r6,r7
;;;900    }
0004f2  e7a8              B        |L1.1094|
                  |L1.1268|
0004f4  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25             ;867
0004f6  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24             ;867
0004f8  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;867
0004fa  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;868
0004fc  e7ef              B        |L1.1246|
                  |L1.1278|
0004fe  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;871
000500  e7ed              B        |L1.1246|
                  |L1.1282|
000502  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;875
000504  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;876
000506  e7ea              B        |L1.1246|
                  |L1.1288|
000508  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;879
00050c  d002              BEQ      |L1.1300|
00050e  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;886
000510  2700              MOVS     r7,#0                 ;887
000512  e7e4              B        |L1.1246|
                  |L1.1300|
000514  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]            ;881
000516  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1                ;882
00051a  e7e0              B        |L1.1246|
;;;901    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteMultiBytesOneReg PROC
;;;919    
;;;920    uint32_t I2C_WriteMultiBytesOneReg(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t u8DataAddr, uint8_t data[], uint32_t u32wLen)
00051c  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;921    {
000520  f8dd9020          LDR      r9,[sp,#0x20]
;;;922        uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000524  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
000528  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
00052a  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;923        uint32_t u32txLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
00052c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;924    
;;;925        g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
00052e  f8df8350          LDR      r8,|L1.2176|
000532  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000534  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;926    
;;;927        I2C_START(i2c);                                              /* Send START */
000538  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
00053a  f0240408          BIC      r4,r4,#8
00053e  f0440420          ORR      r4,r4,#0x20
000542  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
000544  e029              B        |L1.1434|
                  |L1.1350|
;;;928        while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;929        {
;;;930            u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
000546  4ccf              LDR      r4,|L1.2180|
000548  6824              LDR      r4,[r4,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;931            I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
00054a  e001              B        |L1.1360|
                  |L1.1356|
;;;932            {
;;;933                if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
00054c  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
00054e  d00d              BEQ      |L1.1388|
                  |L1.1360|
000550  f8d0a000          LDR      r10,[r0,#0]           ;931
000554  ea5f7a0a          LSLS     r10,r10,#28           ;931
000558  d5f8              BPL      |L1.1356|
                  |L1.1370|
;;;934                {
;;;935                    g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;936                    u8Err = 1u;
;;;937                    break;
;;;938                }
;;;939            }
;;;940    
;;;941            switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
00055a  68c4              LDR      r4,[r0,#0xc]
00055c  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
00055e  d02b              BEQ      |L1.1464|
000560  dc0a              BGT      |L1.1400|
000562  2c08              CMP      r4,#8
000564  d021              BEQ      |L1.1450|
000566  2c18              CMP      r4,#0x18
000568  d10a              BNE      |L1.1408|
00056a  e023              B        |L1.1460|
                  |L1.1388|
00056c  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;935
000570  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]            ;935  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000574  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;936
000576  e7f0              B        |L1.1370|
                  |L1.1400|
000578  2c28              CMP      r4,#0x28
00057a  d020              BEQ      |L1.1470|
00057c  2c30              CMP      r4,#0x30
00057e  d01b              BEQ      |L1.1464|
                  |L1.1408|
;;;942            {
;;;943            case 0x08u:
;;;944                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));    /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
;;;945                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
;;;946                break;
;;;947            case 0x18u:                                           /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;948                I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, u8DataAddr);                   /* Write Lo byte address of register */
;;;949                break;
;;;950            case 0x20u:                                           /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;951            case 0x30u:                                           /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;952                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                       /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;953                u8Err = 1u;
;;;954                break;
;;;955            case 0x28u:
;;;956                if(u32txLen < u32wLen)
;;;957                {
;;;958                    I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data[u32txLen++]);
;;;959                }
;;;960                else
;;;961                {
;;;962                    u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                   /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;963                    u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;964                }
;;;965                break;
;;;966            case 0x38u:                                           /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;967            default:                                             /* Unknow status */
;;;968                I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);        /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000580  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000582  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000586  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
00058a  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;969                u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
00058c  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;970                u8Err = 1u;
00058e  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
                  |L1.1424|
;;;971                break;
;;;972            }
;;;973            I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                        /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000590  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000592  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000596  432c              ORRS     r4,r4,r5
000598  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1434|
00059a  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;928
00059e  d001              BEQ      |L1.1444|
0005a0  2f00              CMP      r7,#0                 ;928
0005a2  d0d0              BEQ      |L1.1350|
                  |L1.1444|
;;;974        }
;;;975    
;;;976        return u32txLen;                                             /* Return bytes length that have been transmitted */
0005a4  4630              MOV      r0,r6
                  |L1.1446|
;;;977    }
0005a6  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
                  |L1.1450|
0005aa  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25             ;944
0005ac  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24             ;944
0005ae  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;944
0005b0  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;945
0005b2  e7ed              B        |L1.1424|
                  |L1.1460|
0005b4  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;948
0005b6  e7eb              B        |L1.1424|
                  |L1.1464|
0005b8  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;952
0005ba  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;953
0005bc  e7e8              B        |L1.1424|
                  |L1.1470|
0005be  454e              CMP      r6,r9                 ;956
0005c0  d204              BCS      |L1.1484|
0005c2  4634              MOV      r4,r6                 ;958
0005c4  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;958
0005c6  5d1c              LDRB     r4,[r3,r4]            ;958
0005c8  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;958
0005ca  e7e1              B        |L1.1424|
                  |L1.1484|
0005cc  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;962
0005ce  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0                ;963
0005d2  e7dd              B        |L1.1424|
;;;978    
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteByteTwoRegs PROC
;;;995    
;;;996    uint8_t I2C_WriteByteTwoRegs(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint16_t u16DataAddr, uint8_t data)
0005d4  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;997    {
;;;998        uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Addr = 1u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
0005d8  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
0005da  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
0005dc  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
0005e0  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;999        uint32_t u32txLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0U;
0005e2  46ac              MOV      r12,r5
;;;1000   
;;;1001       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
0005e4  f8df9298          LDR      r9,|L1.2176|
0005e8  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0005ea  f8c94000          STR      r4,[r9,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1002   
;;;1003       I2C_START(i2c);                                                         /* Send START */
0005ee  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0005f0  f0240408          BIC      r4,r4,#8
0005f4  f0440420          ORR      r4,r4,#0x20
0005f8  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
0005fa  e029              B        |L1.1616|
                  |L1.1532|
;;;1004       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1005       {
;;;1006           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
0005fc  4ca1              LDR      r4,|L1.2180|
0005fe  6824              LDR      r4,[r4,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1007           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000600  e001              B        |L1.1542|
                  |L1.1538|
;;;1008           {
;;;1009               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
000602  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
000604  d00d              BEQ      |L1.1570|
                  |L1.1542|
000606  f8d0a000          LDR      r10,[r0,#0]           ;1007
00060a  ea5f7a0a          LSLS     r10,r10,#28           ;1007
00060e  d5f8              BPL      |L1.1538|
                  |L1.1552|
;;;1010               {
;;;1011                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1012                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1013                   break;
;;;1014               }
;;;1015           }
;;;1016   
;;;1017           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
000610  68c4              LDR      r4,[r0,#0xc]
000612  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
000614  d02a              BEQ      |L1.1644|
000616  dc0a              BGT      |L1.1582|
000618  2c08              CMP      r4,#8
00061a  d01f              BEQ      |L1.1628|
00061c  2c18              CMP      r4,#0x18
00061e  d10a              BNE      |L1.1590|
000620  e021              B        |L1.1638|
                  |L1.1570|
000622  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;1011
000626  f8c94000          STR      r4,[r9,#0]            ;1011  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
00062a  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1012
00062c  e7f0              B        |L1.1552|
                  |L1.1582|
00062e  2c28              CMP      r4,#0x28
000630  d01f              BEQ      |L1.1650|
000632  2c30              CMP      r4,#0x30
000634  d01a              BEQ      |L1.1644|
                  |L1.1590|
;;;1018           {
;;;1019           case 0x08u:
;;;1020               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));               /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
;;;1021               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
;;;1022               break;
;;;1023           case 0x18u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1024               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u16DataAddr & 0xFF00u) >> 8u));    /* Write Hi byte address of register */
;;;1025               break;
;;;1026           case 0x20u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1027           case 0x30u:                                                      /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1028               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1029               u8Err = 1u;
;;;1030               break;
;;;1031           case 0x28u:
;;;1032               if(u8Addr)
;;;1033               {
;;;1034                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u16DataAddr & 0xFFu));       /* Write Lo byte address of register */
;;;1035                   u8Addr = 0u;
;;;1036               }
;;;1037               else if((u32txLen < 1u) && (u8Addr == 0u))
;;;1038               {
;;;1039                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data);
;;;1040                   u32txLen++;
;;;1041               }
;;;1042               else
;;;1043               {
;;;1044                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                              /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1045                   u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;1046               }
;;;1047               break;
;;;1048           case 0x38u:                                                      /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1049           default:                                                        /* Unknow status */
;;;1050               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);                   /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000636  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000638  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
00063c  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
000640  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;1051               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
000642  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;1052               u8Err = 1u;
000644  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
                  |L1.1606|
;;;1053               break;
;;;1054           }
;;;1055           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                                   /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000646  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000648  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
00064c  432c              ORRS     r4,r4,r5
00064e  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1616|
000650  b10f              CBZ      r7,|L1.1622|
000652  2e00              CMP      r6,#0                 ;1004
000654  d0d2              BEQ      |L1.1532|
                  |L1.1622|
;;;1056       }
;;;1057       return (u8Err | u8Xfering);                                             /* return (Success)/(Fail) status */
000656  ea460007          ORR      r0,r6,r7
;;;1058   }
00065a  e7a4              B        |L1.1446|
                  |L1.1628|
00065c  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25             ;1020
00065e  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24             ;1020
000660  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1020
000662  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;1021
000664  e7ef              B        |L1.1606|
                  |L1.1638|
000666  0a14              LSRS     r4,r2,#8              ;1024
000668  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1024
00066a  e7ec              B        |L1.1606|
                  |L1.1644|
00066c  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1028
00066e  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1029
000670  e7e9              B        |L1.1606|
                  |L1.1650|
000672  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0                 ;1032
000676  d004              BEQ      |L1.1666|
000678  b2d4              UXTB     r4,r2                 ;1034
00067a  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1034
00067c  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0                 ;1035
000680  e7e1              B        |L1.1606|
                  |L1.1666|
000682  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;1037
000686  d002              BEQ      |L1.1678|
000688  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1044
00068a  2700              MOVS     r7,#0                 ;1045
00068c  e7db              B        |L1.1606|
                  |L1.1678|
00068e  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]            ;1039
000690  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1                ;1040
000694  e7d7              B        |L1.1606|
;;;1059   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_WriteMultiBytesTwoRegs PROC
;;;1077   
;;;1078   uint32_t I2C_WriteMultiBytesTwoRegs(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint16_t u16DataAddr, uint8_t data[], uint32_t u32wLen)
000696  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;1079   {
00069a  f8dda024          LDR      r10,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1080       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Addr = 1u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
00069e  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
0006a2  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
0006a4  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
0006a8  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1081       uint32_t u32txLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0U;
0006aa  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1082   
;;;1083       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
0006ac  f8df91d0          LDR      r9,|L1.2176|
0006b0  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0006b2  f8c94000          STR      r4,[r9,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1084   
;;;1085       I2C_START(i2c);                                                         /* Send START */
0006b6  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0006b8  f0240408          BIC      r4,r4,#8
0006bc  f0440420          ORR      r4,r4,#0x20
0006c0  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
0006c2  e029              B        |L1.1816|
                  |L1.1732|
;;;1086       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1087       {
;;;1088           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
0006c4  4c6f              LDR      r4,|L1.2180|
0006c6  6824              LDR      r4,[r4,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1089           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
0006c8  e001              B        |L1.1742|
                  |L1.1738|
;;;1090           {
;;;1091               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
0006ca  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
0006cc  d00d              BEQ      |L1.1770|
                  |L1.1742|
0006ce  f8d0b000          LDR      r11,[r0,#0]           ;1089
0006d2  ea5f7b0b          LSLS     r11,r11,#28           ;1089
0006d6  d5f8              BPL      |L1.1738|
                  |L1.1752|
;;;1092               {
;;;1093                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1094                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1095                   break;
;;;1096               }
;;;1097           }
;;;1098   
;;;1099           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
0006d8  68c4              LDR      r4,[r0,#0xc]
0006da  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
0006dc  d02c              BEQ      |L1.1848|
0006de  dc0a              BGT      |L1.1782|
0006e0  2c08              CMP      r4,#8
0006e2  d021              BEQ      |L1.1832|
0006e4  2c18              CMP      r4,#0x18
0006e6  d10a              BNE      |L1.1790|
0006e8  e023              B        |L1.1842|
                  |L1.1770|
0006ea  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;1093
0006ee  f8c94000          STR      r4,[r9,#0]            ;1093  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
0006f2  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;1094
0006f4  e7f0              B        |L1.1752|
                  |L1.1782|
0006f6  2c28              CMP      r4,#0x28
0006f8  d021              BEQ      |L1.1854|
0006fa  2c30              CMP      r4,#0x30
0006fc  d01c              BEQ      |L1.1848|
                  |L1.1790|
;;;1100           {
;;;1101           case 0x08u:
;;;1102               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));               /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
;;;1103               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
;;;1104               break;
;;;1105           case 0x18u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1106               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u16DataAddr & 0xFF00u) >> 8u));    /* Write Hi byte address of register */
;;;1107               break;
;;;1108           case 0x20u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1109           case 0x30u:                                                      /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1110               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1111               u8Err = 1u;
;;;1112               break;
;;;1113           case 0x28u:
;;;1114               if(u8Addr)
;;;1115               {
;;;1116                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u16DataAddr & 0xFFu));       /* Write Lo byte address of register */
;;;1117                   u8Addr = 0u;
;;;1118               }
;;;1119               else if((u32txLen < u32wLen) && (u8Addr == 0u))
;;;1120               {
;;;1121                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, data[u32txLen++]);                           /* Write data to Register I2CDAT*/
;;;1122               }
;;;1123               else
;;;1124               {
;;;1125                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                              /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1126                   u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;1127               }
;;;1128               break;
;;;1129           case 0x38u:                                                      /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1130           default:                                                        /* Unknow status */
;;;1131               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);                   /* Clear SI and send STOP */
0006fe  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000700  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000704  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
000708  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;1132               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
00070a  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;1133               u8Err = 1u;
00070c  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
                  |L1.1806|
;;;1134               break;
;;;1135           }
;;;1136           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                                   /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
00070e  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000710  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000714  432c              ORRS     r4,r4,r5
000716  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1816|
000718  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;1086
00071c  d001              BEQ      |L1.1826|
00071e  2f00              CMP      r7,#0                 ;1086
000720  d0d0              BEQ      |L1.1732|
                  |L1.1826|
;;;1137       }
;;;1138       return u32txLen;                                                        /* Return bytes length that have been transmitted */
000722  4630              MOV      r0,r6
                  |L1.1828|
;;;1139   }
000724  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
                  |L1.1832|
000728  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25             ;1102
00072a  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24             ;1102
00072c  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1102
00072e  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;1103
000730  e7ed              B        |L1.1806|
                  |L1.1842|
000732  0a14              LSRS     r4,r2,#8              ;1106
000734  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1106
000736  e7ea              B        |L1.1806|
                  |L1.1848|
000738  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1110
00073a  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;1111
00073c  e7e7              B        |L1.1806|
                  |L1.1854|
00073e  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0                 ;1114
000742  d004              BEQ      |L1.1870|
000744  b2d4              UXTB     r4,r2                 ;1116
000746  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1116
000748  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0                 ;1117
00074c  e7df              B        |L1.1806|
                  |L1.1870|
00074e  4556              CMP      r6,r10                ;1119
000750  d204              BCS      |L1.1884|
000752  4634              MOV      r4,r6                 ;1121
000754  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;1121
000756  5d1c              LDRB     r4,[r3,r4]            ;1121
000758  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]            ;1121
00075a  e7d8              B        |L1.1806|
                  |L1.1884|
00075c  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1125
00075e  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0                ;1126
000762  e7d4              B        |L1.1806|
;;;1140   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadByte PROC
;;;1153     */
;;;1154   uint8_t I2C_ReadByte(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr)
000764  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1155   {
;;;1156       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, rdata = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000766  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
000768  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
00076a  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1157       uint32_t u32TimeOutCount = 0U;
;;;1158   
;;;1159       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
00076c  4f44              LDR      r7,|L1.2176|
00076e  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000770  603a              STR      r2,[r7,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1160   
;;;1161       I2C_START(i2c);                                                /* Send START */
000772  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000774  f0220208          BIC      r2,r2,#8
000778  f0420220          ORR      r2,r2,#0x20
00077c  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
00077e  e01d              B        |L1.1980|
                  |L1.1920|
;;;1162       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1163       {
;;;1164           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
000780  4a40              LDR      r2,|L1.2180|
000782  6812              LDR      r2,[r2,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1165           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000784  e001              B        |L1.1930|
                  |L1.1926|
;;;1166           {
;;;1167               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
000786  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1
000788  d01f              BEQ      |L1.1994|
                  |L1.1930|
00078a  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]            ;1165
00078c  0724              LSLS     r4,r4,#28             ;1165
00078e  d5fa              BPL      |L1.1926|
                  |L1.1936|
;;;1168               {
;;;1169                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1170                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1171                   break;
;;;1172               }
;;;1173           }
;;;1174   
;;;1175           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
000790  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
000792  2a08              CMP      r2,#8
000794  d01e              BEQ      |L1.2004|
000796  2a40              CMP      r2,#0x40
000798  d023              BEQ      |L1.2018|
00079a  2a48              CMP      r2,#0x48
00079c  d023              BEQ      |L1.2022|
00079e  2a58              CMP      r2,#0x58
0007a0  d024              BEQ      |L1.2028|
;;;1176           {
;;;1177           case 0x08u:
;;;1178               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));    /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
;;;1179               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
;;;1180               break;
;;;1181           case 0x40u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1182               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
;;;1183               break;
;;;1184           case 0x48u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1185               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1186               u8Err = 1u;
;;;1187               break;
;;;1188           case 0x58u:
;;;1189               rdata = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);         /* Receive Data */
;;;1190               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1191               u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;1192               break;
;;;1193           case 0x38u:                                             /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1194           default:                                               /* Unknow status */
;;;1195               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);        /* Clear SI and send STOP */
0007a2  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
0007a4  f022023c          BIC      r2,r2,#0x3c
0007a8  f0420218          ORR      r2,r2,#0x18
0007ac  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
;;;1196               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
0007ae  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
;;;1197               u8Err = 1u;
0007b0  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
                  |L1.1970|
;;;1198               break;
;;;1199           }
;;;1200           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                          /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
0007b2  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
0007b4  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
0007b8  4314              ORRS     r4,r4,r2
0007ba  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1980|
0007bc  b10e              CBZ      r6,|L1.1986|
0007be  2b00              CMP      r3,#0                 ;1162
0007c0  d0de              BEQ      |L1.1920|
                  |L1.1986|
;;;1201       }
;;;1202       if(u8Err)
0007c2  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.1990|
;;;1203       {
;;;1204           rdata = 0u;                                                 /* If occurs error, return 0 */
0007c4  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L1.1990|
;;;1205       }
;;;1206       return rdata;                                                  /* Return read data */
0007c6  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;1207   }
0007c8  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L1.1994|
0007ca  f06f0201          MVN      r2,#1                 ;1169
0007ce  603a              STR      r2,[r7,#0]            ;1169  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
0007d0  2301              MOVS     r3,#1                 ;1170
0007d2  e7dd              B        |L1.1936|
                  |L1.2004|
0007d4  2201              MOVS     r2,#1                 ;1178
0007d6  eb020241          ADD      r2,r2,r1,LSL #1       ;1178
0007da  b2d2              UXTB     r2,r2                 ;1178
0007dc  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1178
0007de  2208              MOVS     r2,#8                 ;1179
0007e0  e7e7              B        |L1.1970|
                  |L1.2018|
0007e2  2208              MOVS     r2,#8                 ;1182
0007e4  e7e5              B        |L1.1970|
                  |L1.2022|
0007e6  2218              MOVS     r2,#0x18              ;1185
0007e8  2301              MOVS     r3,#1                 ;1186
0007ea  e7e2              B        |L1.1970|
                  |L1.2028|
0007ec  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1189
0007ee  b2d5              UXTB     r5,r2                 ;1189
0007f0  2218              MOVS     r2,#0x18              ;1190
0007f2  2600              MOVS     r6,#0                 ;1191
0007f4  e7dd              B        |L1.1970|
;;;1208   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadMultiBytes PROC
;;;1224     */
;;;1225   uint32_t I2C_ReadMultiBytes(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t rdata[], uint32_t u32rLen)
0007f6  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1226   {
;;;1227       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
0007fa  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
0007fc  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1228       uint32_t u32rxLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
0007fe  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1229   
;;;1230       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
000800  f8dfc07c          LDR      r12,|L1.2176|
000804  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000806  f8cc5000          STR      r5,[r12,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1231   
;;;1232       I2C_START(i2c);                                                /* Send START */
00080a  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
00080c  f0250508          BIC      r5,r5,#8
000810  f0450520          ORR      r5,r5,#0x20
000814  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
000816  e02c              B        |L1.2162|
                  |L1.2072|
;;;1233       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1234       {
;;;1235           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
000818  4d1a              LDR      r5,|L1.2180|
00081a  682d              LDR      r5,[r5,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1236           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
00081c  e001              B        |L1.2082|
                  |L1.2078|
;;;1237           {
;;;1238               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
00081e  1e6d              SUBS     r5,r5,#1
000820  d00d              BEQ      |L1.2110|
                  |L1.2082|
000822  f8d08000          LDR      r8,[r0,#0]            ;1236
000826  ea5f7808          LSLS     r8,r8,#28             ;1236
00082a  d5f8              BPL      |L1.2078|
                  |L1.2092|
;;;1239               {
;;;1240                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1241                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1242                   break;
;;;1243               }
;;;1244           }
;;;1245   
;;;1246           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
00082c  68c5              LDR      r5,[r0,#0xc]
00082e  2d48              CMP      r5,#0x48
000830  d033              BEQ      |L1.2202|
000832  dc0a              BGT      |L1.2122|
000834  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
000836  d027              BEQ      |L1.2184|
000838  2d40              CMP      r5,#0x40
00083a  d10a              BNE      |L1.2130|
00083c  e02b              B        |L1.2198|
                  |L1.2110|
00083e  f06f0501          MVN      r5,#1                 ;1240
000842  f8cc5000          STR      r5,[r12,#0]           ;1240  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000846  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1241
000848  e7f0              B        |L1.2092|
                  |L1.2122|
00084a  2d50              CMP      r5,#0x50
00084c  d028              BEQ      |L1.2208|
00084e  2d58              CMP      r5,#0x58
000850  d032              BEQ      |L1.2232|
                  |L1.2130|
;;;1247           {
;;;1248           case 0x08u:
;;;1249               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));    /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
;;;1250               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
;;;1251               break;
;;;1252           case 0x40u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1253               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                          /* Clear SI and set ACK */
;;;1254               break;
;;;1255           case 0x48u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1256               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1257               u8Err = 1u;
;;;1258               break;
;;;1259           case 0x50u:
;;;1260               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);    /* Receive Data */
;;;1261               if(u32rxLen < (u32rLen - 1u))
;;;1262               {
;;;1263                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                             /* Clear SI and set ACK */
;;;1264               }
;;;1265               else
;;;1266               {
;;;1267                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                /* Clear SI */
;;;1268               }
;;;1269               break;
;;;1270           case 0x58u:
;;;1271               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);    /* Receive Data */
;;;1272               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                /* Clear SI and send STOP */
;;;1273               u8Xfering = 0u;
;;;1274               break;
;;;1275           case 0x38u:                                                    /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1276           default:                                                      /* Unknow status */
;;;1277               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);               /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000852  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000854  f025053c          BIC      r5,r5,#0x3c
000858  f0450518          ORR      r5,r5,#0x18
00085c  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
;;;1278               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
00085e  2508              MOVS     r5,#8
;;;1279               u8Err = 1u;
000860  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
                  |L1.2146|
;;;1280               break;
;;;1281           }
;;;1282           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                                 /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000862  f8d08000          LDR      r8,[r0,#0]
000866  f028083c          BIC      r8,r8,#0x3c
00086a  ea480805          ORR      r8,r8,r5
00086e  f8c08000          STR      r8,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.2162|
000872  b10f              CBZ      r7,|L1.2168|
000874  2e00              CMP      r6,#0                 ;1233
000876  d0cf              BEQ      |L1.2072|
                  |L1.2168|
;;;1283       }
;;;1284       return u32rxLen;                                                      /* Return bytes length that have been received */
000878  4620              MOV      r0,r4
                  |L1.2170|
;;;1285   }
00087a  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
00087e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.2176|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L1.2180|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L1.2184|
000888  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;1249
00088a  eb050541          ADD      r5,r5,r1,LSL #1       ;1249
00088e  b2ed              UXTB     r5,r5                 ;1249
000890  6085              STR      r5,[r0,#8]            ;1249
000892  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;1250
000894  e7e5              B        |L1.2146|
                  |L1.2198|
000896  250c              MOVS     r5,#0xc               ;1253
000898  e7e3              B        |L1.2146|
                  |L1.2202|
00089a  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1256
00089c  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1257
00089e  e7e0              B        |L1.2146|
                  |L1.2208|
0008a0  6885              LDR      r5,[r0,#8]            ;1260
0008a2  46a0              MOV      r8,r4                 ;1260
0008a4  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;1260
0008a6  f8025008          STRB     r5,[r2,r8]            ;1260
0008aa  1e5d              SUBS     r5,r3,#1              ;1261
0008ac  42ac              CMP      r4,r5                 ;1261
0008ae  d201              BCS      |L1.2228|
0008b0  250c              MOVS     r5,#0xc               ;1263
0008b2  e7d6              B        |L1.2146|
                  |L1.2228|
0008b4  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;1267
0008b6  e7d4              B        |L1.2146|
                  |L1.2232|
0008b8  6885              LDR      r5,[r0,#8]            ;1271
0008ba  4627              MOV      r7,r4                 ;1271
0008bc  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;1271
0008be  55d5              STRB     r5,[r2,r7]            ;1271
0008c0  2518              MOVS     r5,#0x18              ;1272
0008c2  2700              MOVS     r7,#0                 ;1273
0008c4  e7cd              B        |L1.2146|
;;;1286   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadByteOneReg PROC
;;;1301     */
;;;1302   uint8_t I2C_ReadByteOneReg(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t u8DataAddr)
0008c6  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1303   {
;;;1304       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, rdata = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
0008ca  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
0008ce  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0008d0  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
0008d2  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;1305       uint32_t u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
;;;1306   
;;;1307       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
0008d4  f8df8384          LDR      r8,|L1.3164|
0008d8  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
0008da  f8c85000          STR      r5,[r8,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1308   
;;;1309       I2C_START(i2c);                                                /* Send START */
0008de  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
0008e0  f0250508          BIC      r5,r5,#8
0008e4  f0450520          ORR      r5,r5,#0x20
0008e8  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
0008ea  e048              B        |L1.2430|
                  |L1.2284|
;;;1310       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1311       {
;;;1312           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
0008ec  4ddc              LDR      r5,|L1.3168|
0008ee  682d              LDR      r5,[r5,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1313           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
0008f0  e001              B        |L1.2294|
                  |L1.2290|
;;;1314           {
;;;1315               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
0008f2  1e6d              SUBS     r5,r5,#1
0008f4  d007              BEQ      |L1.2310|
                  |L1.2294|
0008f6  6806              LDR      r6,[r0,#0]            ;1313
0008f8  0736              LSLS     r6,r6,#28             ;1313
0008fa  d5fa              BPL      |L1.2290|
                  |L1.2300|
;;;1316               {
;;;1317                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1318                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1319                   break;
;;;1320               }
;;;1321           }
;;;1322   
;;;1323           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
0008fc  68c5              LDR      r5,[r0,#0xc]
0008fe  f0150f07          TST      r5,#7
000902  d006              BEQ      |L1.2322|
000904  e02e              B        |L1.2404|
                  |L1.2310|
000906  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;1317
00090a  f8c84000          STR      r4,[r8,#0]            ;1317  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
00090e  2401              MOVS     r4,#1                 ;1318
000910  e7f4              B        |L1.2300|
                  |L1.2322|
000912  10ed              ASRS     r5,r5,#3
000914  2d0c              CMP      r5,#0xc
000916  d225              BCS      |L1.2404|
000918  e8dff005          TBB      [pc,r5]
00091c  2406120b          DCB      0x24,0x06,0x12,0x0b
000920  0d100d24          DCB      0x0d,0x10,0x0d,0x24
000924  191b241e          DCB      0x19,0x1b,0x24,0x1e
;;;1324           {
;;;1325           case 0x08u:
;;;1326               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));      /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
000928  064b              LSLS     r3,r1,#25
00092a  0e1b              LSRS     r3,r3,#24
00092c  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]
;;;1327               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
00092e  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1328               break;
000930  e020              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1329           case 0x18u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1330               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, u8DataAddr);                     /* Write Lo byte address of register */
000932  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
;;;1331               break;
000934  e01e              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1332           case 0x20u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1333           case 0x30u:                                             /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1334               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000936  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1335               u8Err = 1u;
000938  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
;;;1336               break;
00093a  e01b              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1337           case 0x28u:
;;;1338               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STA_SI;                         /* Send repeat START */
00093c  2328              MOVS     r3,#0x28
;;;1339               break;
00093e  e019              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1340           case 0x10u:
;;;1341               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));    /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
000940  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
000942  eb030341          ADD      r3,r3,r1,LSL #1
000946  b2db              UXTB     r3,r3
000948  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]
;;;1342               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                               /* Clear SI */
00094a  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1343               break;
00094c  e012              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1344           case 0x40u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1345               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
00094e  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1346               break;
000950  e010              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1347           case 0x48u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1348               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000952  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1349               u8Err = 1u;
000954  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
;;;1350               break;
000956  e00d              B        |L1.2420|
;;;1351           case 0x58u:
;;;1352               rdata = (uint8_t) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);               /* Receive Data */
000958  6883              LDR      r3,[r0,#8]
00095a  b2df              UXTB     r7,r3
;;;1353               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
00095c  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1354               u8Xfering = 0u;
00095e  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0
;;;1355               break;
000962  e007              B        |L1.2420|
                  |L1.2404|
;;;1356           case 0x38u:                                             /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1357           default:                                               /* Unknow status */
;;;1358               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);        /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000964  6803              LDR      r3,[r0,#0]
000966  f023033c          BIC      r3,r3,#0x3c
00096a  f0430318          ORR      r3,r3,#0x18
00096e  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]
;;;1359               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
000970  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1360               u8Err = 1u;
000972  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
                  |L1.2420|
;;;1361               break;
;;;1362           }
;;;1363           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                          /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000974  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000976  f025053c          BIC      r5,r5,#0x3c
00097a  431d              ORRS     r5,r5,r3
00097c  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.2430|
00097e  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;1310
000982  d001              BEQ      |L1.2440|
000984  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;1310
000986  d0b1              BEQ      |L1.2284|
                  |L1.2440|
;;;1364       }
;;;1365       if(u8Err)
000988  b104              CBZ      r4,|L1.2444|
;;;1366       {
;;;1367           rdata = 0u;                                                 /* If occurs error, return 0 */
00098a  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
                  |L1.2444|
;;;1368       }
;;;1369       return rdata;                                                  /* Return read data */
00098c  4638              MOV      r0,r7
;;;1370   }
00098e  e774              B        |L1.2170|
;;;1371   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadMultiBytesOneReg PROC
;;;1387     */
;;;1388   uint32_t I2C_ReadMultiBytesOneReg(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint8_t u8DataAddr, uint8_t rdata[], uint32_t u32rLen)
000990  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1389   {
000994  f8dd9020          LDR      r9,[sp,#0x20]
;;;1390       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000998  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
00099c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00099e  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1391       uint32_t u32rxLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
0009a0  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1392   
;;;1393       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
0009a2  f8df82b8          LDR      r8,|L1.3164|
0009a6  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
0009a8  f8c87000          STR      r7,[r8,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1394   
;;;1395       I2C_START(i2c);                                                /* Send START */
0009ac  6807              LDR      r7,[r0,#0]
0009ae  f0270708          BIC      r7,r7,#8
0009b2  f0470720          ORR      r7,r7,#0x20
0009b6  6007              STR      r7,[r0,#0]
0009b8  e058              B        |L1.2668|
                  |L1.2490|
;;;1396       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1397       {
;;;1398           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
0009ba  4fa9              LDR      r7,|L1.3168|
0009bc  683f              LDR      r7,[r7,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1399           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
0009be  e001              B        |L1.2500|
                  |L1.2496|
;;;1400           {
;;;1401               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
0009c0  1e7f              SUBS     r7,r7,#1
0009c2  d009              BEQ      |L1.2520|
                  |L1.2500|
0009c4  f8d0a000          LDR      r10,[r0,#0]           ;1399
0009c8  ea5f7a0a          LSLS     r10,r10,#28           ;1399
0009cc  d5f8              BPL      |L1.2496|
                  |L1.2510|
;;;1402               {
;;;1403                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1404                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1405                   break;
;;;1406               }
;;;1407           }
;;;1408   
;;;1409           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
0009ce  68c7              LDR      r7,[r0,#0xc]
0009d0  f0170f07          TST      r7,#7
0009d4  d006              BEQ      |L1.2532|
0009d6  e03c              B        |L1.2642|
                  |L1.2520|
0009d8  f06f0601          MVN      r6,#1                 ;1403
0009dc  f8c86000          STR      r6,[r8,#0]            ;1403  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
