0009e0  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1404
0009e2  e7f4              B        |L1.2510|
                  |L1.2532|
0009e4  10ff              ASRS     r7,r7,#3
0009e6  2f0c              CMP      r7,#0xc
0009e8  d233              BCS      |L1.2642|
0009ea  e8dff007          TBB      [pc,r7]
0009ee  3206              DCB      0x32,0x06
0009f0  120b0d10          DCB      0x12,0x0b,0x0d,0x10
0009f4  0d32191b          DCB      0x0d,0x32,0x19,0x1b
0009f8  1e2a              DCB      0x1e,0x2a
;;;1410           {
;;;1411           case 0x08u:
;;;1412               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));      /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
0009fa  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25
0009fc  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24
0009fe  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]
;;;1413               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
000a00  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;1414               break;
000a02  e02e              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1415           case 0x18u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1416               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, u8DataAddr);                     /* Write Lo byte address of register */
000a04  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
;;;1417               break;
000a06  e02c              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1418           case 0x20u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1419           case 0x30u:                                             /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1420               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000a08  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1421               u8Err = 1u;
000a0a  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1422               break;
000a0c  e029              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1423           case 0x28u:
;;;1424               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STA_SI;                         /* Send repeat START */
000a0e  2428              MOVS     r4,#0x28
;;;1425               break;
000a10  e027              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1426           case 0x10u:
;;;1427               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));    /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
000a12  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000a14  eb040441          ADD      r4,r4,r1,LSL #1
000a18  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4
000a1a  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]
;;;1428               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                             /* Clear SI */
000a1c  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;1429               break;
000a1e  e020              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1430           case 0x40u:                                             /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1431               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                          /* Clear SI and set ACK */
000a20  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
;;;1432               break;
000a22  e01e              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1433           case 0x48u:                                             /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1434               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000a24  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1435               u8Err = 1u;
000a26  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1436               break;
000a28  e01b              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1437           case 0x50u:
;;;1438               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (uint8_t) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);   /* Receive Data */
000a2a  6884              LDR      r4,[r0,#8]
000a2c  462f              MOV      r7,r5
000a2e  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
000a30  55dc              STRB     r4,[r3,r7]
;;;1439               if(u32rxLen < (u32rLen - 1u))
000a32  f1a90401          SUB      r4,r9,#1
000a36  42a5              CMP      r5,r4
000a38  d201              BCS      |L1.2622|
;;;1440               {
;;;1441                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                      /* Clear SI and set ACK */
000a3a  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
000a3c  e011              B        |L1.2658|
                  |L1.2622|
;;;1442               }
;;;1443               else
;;;1444               {
;;;1445                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                         /* Clear SI */
000a3e  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
000a40  e00f              B        |L1.2658|
;;;1446               }
;;;1447               break;
;;;1448           case 0x58u:
;;;1449               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (uint8_t) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);   /* Receive Data */
000a42  6884              LDR      r4,[r0,#8]
000a44  462f              MOV      r7,r5
000a46  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
000a48  55dc              STRB     r4,[r3,r7]
;;;1450               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                         /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000a4a  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1451               u8Xfering = 0u;
000a4c  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0
;;;1452               break;
000a50  e007              B        |L1.2658|
                  |L1.2642|
;;;1453           case 0x38u:                                             /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1454           default:                                               /* Unknow status */
;;;1455               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);        /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000a52  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
000a54  f024043c          BIC      r4,r4,#0x3c
000a58  f0440418          ORR      r4,r4,#0x18
000a5c  6004              STR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;1456               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
000a5e  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;1457               u8Err = 1u;
000a60  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
                  |L1.2658|
;;;1458               break;
;;;1459           }
;;;1460           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                          /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000a62  6807              LDR      r7,[r0,#0]
000a64  f027073c          BIC      r7,r7,#0x3c
000a68  4327              ORRS     r7,r7,r4
000a6a  6007              STR      r7,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.2668|
000a6c  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;1396
000a70  d001              BEQ      |L1.2678|
000a72  2e00              CMP      r6,#0                 ;1396
000a74  d0a1              BEQ      |L1.2490|
                  |L1.2678|
;;;1461       }
;;;1462       return u32rxLen;                                               /* Return bytes length that have been received */
000a76  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;1463   }
000a78  e595              B        |L1.1446|
;;;1464   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadByteTwoRegs PROC
;;;1478     */
;;;1479   uint8_t I2C_ReadByteTwoRegs(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint16_t u16DataAddr)
000a7a  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;1480   {
;;;1481       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, rdata = 0u, u8Addr = 1u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000a7e  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
000a82  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000a84  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
000a86  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
000a8a  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;1482       uint32_t u32TimeOutCount = 0u;
;;;1483   
;;;1484       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;
000a8c  f8df91cc          LDR      r9,|L1.3164|
000a90  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000a92  f8c95000          STR      r5,[r9,#0]  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
;;;1485   
;;;1486       I2C_START(i2c);                                                         /* Send START */
000a96  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000a98  f0250508          BIC      r5,r5,#8
000a9c  f0450520          ORR      r5,r5,#0x20
000aa0  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
000aa2  e051              B        |L1.2888|
                  |L1.2724|
;;;1487       while(u8Xfering && (u8Err == 0u))
;;;1488       {
;;;1489           u32TimeOutCount = I2C_TIMEOUT;
000aa4  4d6e              LDR      r5,|L1.3168|
000aa6  682d              LDR      r5,[r5,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1490           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000aa8  e001              B        |L1.2734|
                  |L1.2730|
;;;1491           {
;;;1492               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
000aaa  1e6d              SUBS     r5,r5,#1
000aac  d007              BEQ      |L1.2750|
                  |L1.2734|
000aae  6806              LDR      r6,[r0,#0]            ;1490
000ab0  0736              LSLS     r6,r6,#28             ;1490
000ab2  d5fa              BPL      |L1.2730|
                  |L1.2740|
;;;1493               {
;;;1494                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1495                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1496                   break;
;;;1497               }
;;;1498           }
;;;1499   
;;;1500           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))
000ab4  68c5              LDR      r5,[r0,#0xc]
000ab6  f0150f07          TST      r5,#7
000aba  d006              BEQ      |L1.2762|
000abc  e037              B        |L1.2862|
                  |L1.2750|
000abe  f06f0401          MVN      r4,#1                 ;1494
000ac2  f8c94000          STR      r4,[r9,#0]            ;1494  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000ac6  2401              MOVS     r4,#1                 ;1495
000ac8  e7f4              B        |L1.2740|
                  |L1.2762|
000aca  10ed              ASRS     r5,r5,#3
000acc  2d0c              CMP      r5,#0xc
000ace  d22e              BCS      |L1.2862|
000ad0  e8dff005          TBB      [pc,r5]
000ad4  2d061b0b          DCB      0x2d,0x06,0x1b,0x0b
000ad8  0e110e2d          DCB      0x0e,0x11,0x0e,0x2d
000adc  22242d27          DCB      0x22,0x24,0x2d,0x27
;;;1501           {
;;;1502           case 0x08u:
;;;1503               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));               /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
000ae0  064b              LSLS     r3,r1,#25
000ae2  0e1b              LSRS     r3,r3,#24
000ae4  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]
;;;1504               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
000ae6  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1505               break;
000ae8  e029              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1506           case 0x18u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1507               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u16DataAddr & 0xFF00u) >> 8u));    /* Write Hi byte address of register */
000aea  0a15              LSRS     r5,r2,#8
000aec  6085              STR      r5,[r0,#8]
;;;1508               break;
000aee  e026              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1509           case 0x20u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1510           case 0x30u:                                                      /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1511               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000af0  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1512               u8Err = 1u;
000af2  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
;;;1513               break;
000af4  e023              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1514           case 0x28u:
;;;1515               if(u8Addr)
000af6  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0
000afa  d004              BEQ      |L1.2822|
;;;1516               {
;;;1517                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u16DataAddr & 0xFFu));       /* Write Lo byte address of register */
000afc  b2d5              UXTB     r5,r2
000afe  6085              STR      r5,[r0,#8]
;;;1518                   u8Addr = 0u;
000b00  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
000b04  e01b              B        |L1.2878|
                  |L1.2822|
;;;1519               }
;;;1520               else
;;;1521               {
;;;1522                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STA_SI;                              /* Clear SI and send repeat START */
000b06  2328              MOVS     r3,#0x28
000b08  e019              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1523               }
;;;1524               break;
;;;1525           case 0x10u:
;;;1526               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));             /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
000b0a  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
000b0c  eb030341          ADD      r3,r3,r1,LSL #1
000b10  b2db              UXTB     r3,r3
000b12  6083              STR      r3,[r0,#8]
;;;1527               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
000b14  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1528               break;
000b16  e012              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1529           case 0x40u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1530               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
000b18  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1531               break;
000b1a  e010              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1532           case 0x48u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1533               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000b1c  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1534               u8Err = 1u;
000b1e  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
;;;1535               break;
000b20  e00d              B        |L1.2878|
;;;1536           case 0x58u:
;;;1537               rdata = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);                  /* Receive Data */
000b22  6883              LDR      r3,[r0,#8]
000b24  b2df              UXTB     r7,r3
;;;1538               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000b26  2318              MOVS     r3,#0x18
;;;1539               u8Xfering = 0u;
000b28  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0
;;;1540               break;
000b2c  e007              B        |L1.2878|
                  |L1.2862|
;;;1541           case 0x38u:                                                      /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1542           default:                                                        /* Unknow status */
;;;1543               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);                 /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000b2e  6803              LDR      r3,[r0,#0]
000b30  f023033c          BIC      r3,r3,#0x3c
000b34  f0430318          ORR      r3,r3,#0x18
000b38  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]
;;;1544               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;
000b3a  2308              MOVS     r3,#8
;;;1545               u8Err = 1u;
000b3c  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
                  |L1.2878|
;;;1546               break;
;;;1547           }
;;;1548           I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, u8Ctrl);                                   /* Write controlbit to I2C_CTL register */
000b3e  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000b40  f025053c          BIC      r5,r5,#0x3c
000b44  431d              ORRS     r5,r5,r3
000b46  6005              STR      r5,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.2888|
000b48  f1bc0f00          CMP      r12,#0                ;1487
000b4c  d001              BEQ      |L1.2898|
000b4e  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;1487
000b50  d0a8              BEQ      |L1.2724|
                  |L1.2898|
;;;1549       }
;;;1550       if(u8Err)
000b52  b104              CBZ      r4,|L1.2902|
;;;1551       {
;;;1552           rdata = 0u;                                                          /* If occurs error, return 0 */
000b54  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
                  |L1.2902|
;;;1553       }
;;;1554       return rdata;                                                           /* Return read data */
000b56  4638              MOV      r0,r7
;;;1555   }
000b58  e475              B        |L1.1094|
;;;1556   
                          ENDP

                  I2C_ReadMultiBytesTwoRegs PROC
;;;1572     */
;;;1573   uint32_t I2C_ReadMultiBytesTwoRegs(I2C_T *i2c, uint8_t u8SlaveAddr, uint16_t u16DataAddr, uint8_t rdata[], uint32_t u32rLen)
000b5a  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;1574   {
000b5e  f8dda024          LDR      r10,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1575       uint8_t u8Xfering = 1u, u8Err = 0u, u8Addr = 1u, u8Ctrl = 0u;
000b62  f04f0c01          MOV      r12,#1
000b66  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000b68  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
000b6c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1576       uint32_t u32rxLen = 0u, u32TimeOutCount = 0u;

;;;1577   
;;;1578       g_I2C_i32ErrCode = 0;

;;;1579

000b7a  6807              LDR      r7,[r0,#0]

000b8a  683f              LDR      r7,[r7,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;1584           I2C_WAIT_READY(i2c)
000b8c  e001              B        |L1.2962|
                  |L1.2958|
;;;1585           {
;;;1586               if(--u32TimeOutCount == 0)
000b8e  1e7f              SUBS     r7,r7,#1
000b90  d009              BEQ      |L1.2982|
                  |L1.2962|
000b92  f8d0b000          LDR      r11,[r0,#0]           ;1584
000b96  ea5f7b0b          LSLS     r11,r11,#28           ;1584
000b9a  d5f8              BPL      |L1.2958|
                  |L1.2972|
;;;1587               {
;;;1588                   g_I2C_i32ErrCode = I2C_ERR_TIMEOUT;
;;;1589                   u8Err = 1u;
;;;1590                   break;
;;;1591               }
;;;1592           }
;;;1593   
;;;1594           switch(I2C_GET_STATUS(i2c))

000b9e  f0170f07          TST      r7,#7
000ba2  d006              BEQ      |L1.2994|
000ba4  e045              B        |L1.3122|
                  |L1.2982|
000ba6  f06f0601          MVN      r6,#1                 ;1588
000baa  f8c96000          STR      r6,[r9,#0]            ;1588  ; g_I2C_i32ErrCode
000bae  2601              MOVS     r6,#1                 ;1589
000bb0  e7f4              B        |L1.2972|
                  |L1.2994|
000bb2  10ff              ASRS     r7,r7,#3
000bb4  2f0c              CMP      r7,#0xc
000bb6  d23c              BCS      |L1.3122|
000bb8  e8dff007          TBB      [pc,r7]
000bbc  3b061b0b          DCB      0x3b,0x06,0x1b,0x0b

000bc4  22242733          DCB      0x22,0x24,0x27,0x33
;;;1595           {
;;;1596           case 0x08u:
;;;1597               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u8SlaveAddr << 1u | 0x00u));               /* Write SLA+W to Register I2CDAT */
000bc8  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25
000bca  0e24              LSRS     r4,r4,#24
000bcc  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]
;;;1598               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
000bce  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;1599               break;
000bd0  e037              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1600           case 0x18u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1601               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u16DataAddr & 0xFF00u) >> 8u));    /* Write Hi byte address of register */
000bd2  0a17              LSRS     r7,r2,#8
000bd4  6087              STR      r7,[r0,#8]

;;;1603           case 0x20u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1604           case 0x30u:                                                      /* Master transmit data NACK */
;;;1605               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000bd8  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1606               u8Err = 1u;
000bda  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1607               break;
000bdc  e031              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1608           case 0x28u:
;;;1609               if(u8Addr)
000bde  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0
000be2  d004              BEQ      |L1.3054|
;;;1610               {
;;;1611                   I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)(u16DataAddr & 0xFFu));       /* Write Lo byte address of register */

;;;1612                   u8Addr = 0u;

000bec  e029              B        |L1.3138|
                  |L1.3054|
;;;1613               }
;;;1614               else
;;;1615               {
;;;1616                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STA_SI;                              /* Clear SI and send repeat START */
000bee  2428              MOVS     r4,#0x28
000bf0  e027              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1617               }
;;;1618               break;
;;;1619           case 0x10u:
;;;1620               I2C_SET_DATA(i2c, (uint8_t)((u8SlaveAddr << 1u) | 0x01u));             /* Write SLA+R to Register I2CDAT */
000bf2  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000bf4  eb040441          ADD      r4,r4,r1,LSL #1
000bf8  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4
000bfa  6084              STR      r4,[r0,#8]
;;;1621               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                      /* Clear SI */
000bfc  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;1622               break;
000bfe  e020              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1623           case 0x40u:                                                      /* Slave Address ACK */
;;;1624               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                                   /* Clear SI and set ACK */
000c00  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
;;;1625               break;
000c02  e01e              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1626           case 0x48u:                                                      /* Slave Address NACK */
;;;1627               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000c04  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1628               u8Err = 1u;
000c06  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1629               break;
000c08  e01b              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1630           case 0x50u:
;;;1631               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);      /* Receive Data */
000c0a  6884              LDR      r4,[r0,#8]
000c0c  462f              MOV      r7,r5
000c0e  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
000c10  55dc              STRB     r4,[r3,r7]
;;;1632               if(u32rxLen < (u32rLen - 1u))
000c12  f1aa0401          SUB      r4,r10,#1

000c18  d201              BCS      |L1.3102|
;;;1633               {
;;;1634                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI_AA;                               /* Clear SI and set ACK */
000c1a  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
000c1c  e011              B        |L1.3138|
                  |L1.3102|
;;;1635               }
;;;1636               else
;;;1637               {
;;;1638                   u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_SI;                                  /* Clear SI */
000c1e  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
000c20  e00f              B        |L1.3138|
;;;1639               }
;;;1640               break;
;;;1641           case 0x58u:
;;;1642               rdata[u32rxLen++] = (unsigned char) I2C_GET_DATA(i2c);      /* Receive Data */
000c22  6884              LDR      r4,[r0,#8]
000c24  462f              MOV      r7,r5
000c26  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
000c28  55dc              STRB     r4,[r3,r7]
;;;1643               u8Ctrl = I2C_CTL_STO_SI;                                  /* Clear SI and send STOP */
000c2a  2418              MOVS     r4,#0x18
;;;1644               u8Xfering = 0u;
000c2c  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0
;;;1645               break;
000c30  e007              B        |L1.3138|
                  |L1.3122|
;;;1646           case 0x38u:                                                      /* Arbitration Lost */
;;;1647           default:                                                        /* Unknow status */
;;;1648               I2C_SET_CONTROL_REG(i2c, I2C_CTL_STO_SI);                 /* Clear SI and send STOP */

;;;1650               u8Err = 1u;

;;;1651               break;

000c54  d098              BEQ      |L1.2952|

;;;1654       }
;;;1655       return u32rxLen;                                                        /* Return bytes length that have been received */
